name: Chicken on Biscuits<mom's>
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a Dutch oven.
2. Saute celery and green pepper until tender.
3. Mix together the soup, flour, salt, and pepper.
4. Add the mixture to the Dutch oven.
5. Add chicken, milk, and pimento.
6. Cook and stir until steaming.
7. Serve over biscuits.
